hero.legalDisclaimer: Prossimo is not affiliated with GTT
hero.title: Check nearby stops, follow your bus or tram, and know exactly when to leave
hero.subtitle: Prossimo is your companion for Turin. See nearby stops, track your bus or tram, and get real-time updates on when to leave.

features.title: Everything you need before the next ride
features.subtitle: Simple tools for finding a stop, checking arrivals, and keeping your usual routes close.

nearbyStops.title: Nearby stops at a glance
nearbyStops.body: Open the app and see the stops around you without digging through the full network.

liveArrivals.title: Live arrivals
liveArrivals.body: Know whether the next bus or tram is arriving now, delayed, or still on schedule.

savedLines.title: Your usual lines
savedLines.body: Keep the routes you use most often easy to find when you are on the move.

clearSearch.title: Search across stops and lines
clearSearch.body: Find a stop name, stop code, line number, or destination from one focused search.

faq.title: Questions before you ride
faq.subtitle: A few details about coverage, live data, and how Prossimo works.

coverage.question: Where does Prossimo work?
coverage.answer: Prossimo is built for Turin and the local public transport network, including buses and trams.

realtime.question: Are arrivals shown in real time?
realtime.answer: When live data is available, Prossimo shows real-time arrivals and keeps scheduled times clear when live updates are not present.

location.question: Do I need to share my location?
location.answer: Location sharing is optional. It helps Prossimo show nearby stops faster, and you can still search manually without it.

price.question: Is Prossimo free?
price.answer: Yes. You can download the app and use the core transit features for free.

cta.title: Ready for the next ride?
cta.subtitle: Download Prossimo and keep Turin transit close when you are out the door.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: If you have any questions, feedback, or need help with Prossimo, feel free to reach out to us by email. We'll do our best to get back to you as soon as possible.

home.title: Welcome to Prossimo
home.subtitle: This text comes from the shared localization package.

map.zoomWarning: Zoom in to see nearby stops.
map.invalidVehiclePositionToast: This vehicle is reporting a wrong location and can't be followed right now.
map.unavailable: Maps are only available on Android and iOS.

drawer.searchSubtitle: Find a stop or line across the network.
drawer.noNearbyStopsDescription: Enable location sharing to see stops around you, or search for any stop.
drawer.noMatchingStopsDescription: Try a stop name, stop code, or line number.
drawer.linesDescription: Lines are sorted alphabetically. Load more to keep browsing.
drawer.noLinesDescription: Lines will appear here when transit data is available.
drawer.noMatchingLinesDescription: Try a line number, route name, or destination.

lineDetail.noLiveVehicles: No live vehicles on this line right now.

arrivals.liveLegend: Live arrivals use this background color.
arrivals.staleRealtimeData: Live data is over a minute old. Refreshing now.

alerts.emptyDescription: Current alerts for this stop will appear here.
alerts.title: Service alert

strikeAlert.title: Strike today
strikeAlert.description: A transit strike is scheduled for today. Some services may be disrupted.

summary.today: Strike today, press to read more
summary.tomorrow: Strike tomorrow, press to read more
summary.nextWeek: Strike next week on {{date}}, press to read more
summary.incoming: Incoming strike on {{date}}, press to read more
summary.incomingWithoutDate: Incoming strike, press to read more

notifications.permissionPromptMessage: Prossimo can notify you when a public transport strike is planned for today or tomorrow. Allow notifications to receive these alerts.
notifications.permissionBlockedMessage: Notifications are disabled for Prossimo. Enable them in system settings to receive strike alerts.
notifications.errorToast: Could not update strike notifications. Try again.
notifications.todayBody: A public transport strike is planned for today. Open Prossimo for details.
notifications.tomorrowBody: A public transport strike is planned for tomorrow. Open Prossimo for details.

onboarding.title: Turin transit, live
onboarding.subtitle: Check nearby stops, follow your bus or tram, and know exactly when to leave

tracking.title: We need your help to improve Prossimo
tracking.subtitle: Prossimo can use activity tracking signals to understand how people use the app and improve the experience. This is optional, and you can choose to share this information or not.

location.title: We need location access
location.subtitle: Prossimo uses your location to find the nearest stops and show the transport options around you.

detail.description: Controlled in device settings. When allowed, Prossimo can use app activity signals to improve the experience.

dataSources.title: Data sources
dataSources.sourceDescription: Transit data is taken from the GTFS real-time feed provided by GTT S.p.A. – Gruppo Torinese Trasporti.
dataSources.strikeSourceName: Ministero delle Infrastrutture e dei Trasporti (MIT)
dataSources.strikeSourceDescription: Strike notices are sourced from the public RSS feed provided by the Italian Ministry of Infrastructure and Transport (Ministero delle Infrastrutture e dei Trasporti).
dataSources.mapSourceDescription: Map data on Android is provided by Google Maps. Google Maps content is subject to Google's terms and privacy policy.
dataSources.independentDisclaimer: Prossimo is an independent app and is not affiliated with GTT, 5T, or the Italian Ministry of Infrastructure and Transport.

developerTools.title: Developer tools
developerTools.resetOnboardingDescription: Show onboarding again for this user.
